records.ety: [L. inauguratio a beginning: cf. F. inauguration.]

defs: The act of inaugurating, or inducting into office with solemnity; investiture by appropriate ceremonies.
quotes: At his regal inauguration, his old father resigned the kingdom to him.

defs: The formal beginning or initiation of any movement, course of action, etc.; as, the inauguration of a new system, a new condition, etc.
